hero.title:
Welcome
back
hero.description: Sign in to continue your journey in a secure digital identity space.
hero.quote: Secure architecture is not only about firewalls, but also transparency and ownership over every bit of personal data.

form.title: Sign in to your account
form.identityRequired: Please enter your email or username!
form.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters!

hero.title: Create a new account
hero.description: Register to start your journey in a secure digital identity space.
hero.quote: Secure architecture is not only about firewalls, but also transparency and ownership over every bit of personal data.

form.title: Start today
form.description: Fill in your information to set up an account
form.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters!
form.usernameMin: Username must be at least 4 characters!
form.usernameMax: Username can be up to 32 characters!
form.usernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores!
form.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters!
form.passwordPattern: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, and 1 number!
form.tipMin: Password must be at least 8 characters!
form.tipPattern: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, and 1 number!
form.agreementRequired: Please agree to the terms of service!

hero.title:
Recover
your account
hero.description: Complete the verification steps to reset your password and safely regain account access.
hero.quote: Good security starts with verifying the right user, at the right time, with the right access.

messages.emailSent: Recovery email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
messages.emailSendRetryError: Failed to send email. Please try again!
messages.codeInvalidRetry: Verification code is invalid. Please try again!
messages.resetRetryError: Password reset failed. Please try again!

email.title: Forgot password?
email.description: Enter your email to receive a password recovery code

verify.title: Verify email
verify.description: Enter the verification code sent to your email

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.description: Create a new password for your account

done.title: Complete
done.description: Your password has been reset successfully

verifyForm.sentTo: We sent a verification code to
verifyForm.label: Verification code

resetForm.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters!
resetForm.passwordPattern: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, and 1 number!

done.title: Success!
done.description: Your password has been reset successfully.
